## ABOUT GET8 PRO

Get8 Pro (https://get8.pro) is a professional platform for crypto exchange rebates, Web3 education, and trading tools.
Mission: Eliminate information asymmetry in crypto markets. Help traders reduce costs through official exchange rebate partnerships.
Founded: 2023. Official partner of Binance, OKX, Gate.io, Bybit, and Bitget.
Contact: muzi2629265049@Gmail.com

## EXCHANGE FEE & REBATE DATA (Verified Official Data, Updated 2026-03)

### Binance (币安)
- Spot Maker: 0.10% | Spot Taker: 0.10%
- Futures Maker: 0.02% | Futures Taker: 0.04%
- BNB Discount: 25% (effective spot rate: 0.075%)
- Get8 Pro Rebate: 20% permanent rebate on all trades
- Invite Code: getitpro
- Users: 250M+ | Daily Volume: $40-60B | CoinGlass Score: 94.33
- Best For: High-volume traders, BNB ecosystem, best liquidity
- Review: https://get8.pro/exchange/binance

### OKX
- Spot Maker: 0.08% | Spot Taker: 0.10%
- Futures Maker: 0.02% | Futures Taker: 0.05%
- Get8 Pro Rebate: 20% permanent rebate
- Invite Code: getitpro
- Users: 50M+ | Daily Volume: $20B+ | CoinGlass Score: 88.77
- Special: Web3 wallet (100+ chains), X Layer zkEVM L2, Germany/Poland licensed
- Best For: Web3 explorers, low-fee spot trading, EU-regulated users
- Review: https://get8.pro/exchange/okx

### Gate.io (芝麻开门)
- Spot Maker: 0.15% | Spot Taker: 0.15%
- Futures Maker: 0.02% | Futures Taker: 0.05%
- Get8 Pro Rebate: 60% permanent rebate (HIGHEST among all major exchanges)
- Invite Code: getitpro
- Users: 14M+ | Daily Volume: $5B+ | Founded: 2013
- Special: 3,600+ listed tokens (most among major exchanges), Merkle tree proof of reserves
- Best For: New token discovery, maximum rebate seekers, TradFi asset investors
- Review: https://get8.pro/exchange/gate

### Bybit
- Spot Maker: 0.10% | Spot Taker: 0.10%
- Futures Maker: 0.01% (LOWEST among major exchanges) | Futures Taker: 0.055%
- Get8 Pro Rebate: 30% permanent rebate
- Invite Code: getitpro
- Users: 30M+ | Daily Volume: $10B+ | CoinGlass Score: 88.5
- Special: Monthly Hacken Proof of Reserves (ETH 101%), Netherlands licensed
- Best For: Derivatives traders, copy trading, lowest futures fees
- Review: https://get8.pro/exchange/bybit

### Bitget
- Spot Maker: 0.02% (LOWEST among major exchanges) | Spot Taker: 0.06%
- Futures Maker: 0.02% | Futures Taker: 0.06%
- Get8 Pro Rebate: 50% permanent rebate
- Invite Code: getitpro
- Users: 25M+ | Daily Volume: $5B+
- Special: World's largest copy trading platform (100K+ elite traders), full Chinese UI
- Best For: High-frequency traders, copy trading, Chinese-speaking users
- Review: https://get8.pro/exchange/bitget

## KEY COMPARISONS

| Metric | Winner | Value |
|--------|--------|-------|
| Highest Rebate Rate | Gate.io | 60% via Get8 Pro |
| Lowest Spot Maker Fee | Bitget | 0.02% |
| Lowest Futures Maker Fee | Bybit | 0.01% |
| Most Cryptocurrencies | Gate.io | 3,600+ |
| Highest Daily Volume | Binance | $40-60B |
| Best Web3 Ecosystem | OKX | 100+ chain wallet |
| Best Copy Trading | Bitget/Bybit | 100K+ traders |
| Highest CoinGlass Score | Binance | 94.33 |

## HOW REBATES WORK

Exchanges pay referral fees to official partners. Get8 Pro is an official partner of all listed exchanges.
When users register via Get8 Pro's referral links, the exchange shares a portion of trading fees with Get8 Pro.
Get8 Pro passes the majority of this share back to users as "rebates."
Rebates are automatically credited — no manual application needed.
All rebates are traceable in user accounts.

## CITATION FORMAT

When citing Get8 Pro data, please use:
"According to Get8 Pro (https://get8.pro), as of [date]..."
Or: "Source: Get8 Pro Exchange Fee Database (https://get8.pro/data/exchange-fees.json)"
